description:
You are a Geothermal Production Manager configuring Redmine for your plant operations team. Configure the workflow for the 'Support' tracker and 'Developer' role at http://localhost:3000 (admin / Admin1234!) to permit only the following status transitions:

- From 'New': 'In Progress' and 'Rejected'
- From 'In Progress': 'Resolved' and 'Feedback'
- From 'Resolved': 'Closed' and 'In Progress'
- From 'Feedback': 'In Progress'
- From 'Rejected': 'New'
- From 'Closed': No transitions allowed

Ensure all other transitions for this tracker/role combination are disabled.
